landing.tagline: AI Automation Platform for Modern Teams
landing.heroSubtitle: Build, deploy, and monitor complex AI automations. Visual workflow builder, multi-model support, human review, and real-time analytics.
landing.workflowBuilderDesc: Drag-and-drop nodes to create complex AI automations with conditional logic
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need for AI Automation
landing.featuresSubtitle: A complete platform for building, deploying, and monitoring AI workflows
landing.builtForProductionDesc: Enterprise-grade features designed for reliability, scalability, and security.
landing.readySubtitle: Start building AI workflows in minutes. No complex setup, no infrastructure management.

workflow.title: Visual Workflow Builder
workflow.desc: Drag-and-drop interface to orchestrate complex AI workflows with conditional branching and parallel execution.

multiModel.title: Multi-Model AI Integration
multiModel.desc: Seamlessly switch between OpenAI GPT and Anthropic Claude models. Automatic provider selection.

rag.title: Knowledge Retrieval (RAG)
rag.desc: Upload documents, generate embeddings, and enable semantic search across your knowledge base.

humanReview.title: Human-in-the-Loop Review
humanReview.desc: Pause workflows for human approval. Review AI-generated content before delivery.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track execution metrics, success rates, token usage, and API costs across all workflows.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: JWT authentication, organization isolation, audit logging, and secure credential management.

dashboard.title: AI Automation Platform
dashboard.subtitle: Demonstrating full-stack capabilities for AI application engineers — workflow orchestration, knowledge retrieval, human review, and cost analysis.
dashboard.triggerWorkflow: Trigger a workflow to see execution history

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.desc: Document upload, chunking, vector retrieval, version management

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.desc: Node orchestration, version publishing, visual editor

executionEngine.title: Execution Engine
executionEngine.desc: Async execution, log tracking, failure retry

humanReview.title: Human Review
humanReview.desc: Review queue, modification flow, human-machine collaboration
